provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, curse scroll, tightly rolled dark stained parchment tied with a thorned black leather cord, jet black wax seal cracked down the middle, the paper is aged and brittle with dark spots and torn edges, ominous dark brown and black tones, the scroll radiates a sense of dread and decay
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Dark stamp or seal tool on light parchment background, not a scroll. Wrong item identity and wrong background color.
